title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Larsen & Toubro - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Larsen & Toubro - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Larsen & Toubro is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Larsen & Toubro:
Larsen & Toubro is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro!
